seoDescription: Family-operated property maintenance in Santa Rosa, CA. Lawn care, window & gutter cleaning, pressure washing, and more across Sonoma County.

about.heading: About Seasons Property Maintenance
body: Seasons Property Maintenance is a locally owned and family-operated business dedicated to providing reliable, year-round exterior care for homes and businesses throughout Sonoma County. From Santa Rosa to Petaluma, Rohnert Park, and Windsor, we help property owners and managers keep their spaces looking their best.

We focus on dependable service and attention to detail across everything we do, from lawn care and high weed mowing to window cleaning, gutter cleaning, pressure washing, and solar panel cleaning. Our goal is simple: professional property care you can count on in every season.

services.title: Lawn Care & Mowing
services.description: Regular grass cutting and lawn upkeep to keep your yard healthy and well maintained.

services.title: High Weed Mowing & Vegetation Management
services.description: Clearing of overgrown weeds and brush to keep properties tidy and fire-safe.

services.title: Window Cleaning
services.description: Professional interior and exterior window cleaning for homes and businesses.

services.title: Gutter Cleaning
services.description: Removal of leaves and debris to keep gutters flowing and protect your property.

services.title: Pressure Washing
services.description: Exterior surface cleaning for driveways, walkways, siding, and patios.

services.title: Debris & Leaf Removal
services.description: Seasonal cleanup and hauling of leaves, yard waste, and accumulated debris.

services.title: Solar Panel Cleaning
services.description: Careful cleaning of solar panels to help maintain efficiency and output.

items.a: You'll find us at 1753 Willowside Road, Santa Rosa, California, 95401.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at 707-360-2559 — we're glad to help.
